name: Nœud Forteresse
description: Véhicule lourd mobile fortement blindé. Serveur de campagne autonome, il peut tenir une position indéfiniment.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Ultra-heavy mobile fortress vehicle, enormous monolithic rectangular dark grey armored box on wide tracks, multiple antenna arrays and cold blue neural glow from vents, barcode serials massive on side panels. Human heads partially visible integrated as multiple computing nodes. Immovable defensive position. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
